impact: This gives the worker daemon eligible, fixture-first tasks that continue the original PP&D plan without implementing domain artifacts in the supervisor proposal, and it keeps live/authenticated automation behind deterministic validation and guardrails.
summary: Append the next narrow PP&D backlog tranche after all 47 existing tasks completed.
target_task: Supervisor repair: all PP&D daemon tasks are complete; review the original PP&D goal and add the next task-board tranche

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
